title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Kolte-Patil Developers - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
